channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Armenian PM Pashinyan declares victory in parliamentary elections
item.description: Armenian PM Pashinyan declares victory in parliamentary elections

item.title: Could ex-ISIL fighters be used against Iran, as a Russian official claimed?
item.description: Russia’s Federal Security Service chief said Western powers could weaponise ex-fighters, but analysts doubt the claim.

item.title: Ohio police drag away football pitch invader in pre-World Cup friendly
item.description: US police were filmed dragging away a pitch-invading fan during a friendly football match between Ecuador and Guatemala.

item.title: Iran spokesman says US to blame for resumption of hostilities
item.description: Iran’s FM spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei said Israel’s ally the US is responsible for ‘whatever happens in the region'.

item.title: Iran and Israel bomb each other: Is the ceasefire over?
item.description: Analysts say both sides are pushing the ceasefire to its limits while seeking greater leverage.

item.title: PM Pashinyan’s party wins Armenia election, preliminary results show
item.description: Nikol Pashinyan's Civil ​Contract party wins 49.81 percent of ​the vote, the ​Central Election Commission says.

item.title: Israel kills 14 people in attacks across Gaza
item.description: Israel killed at least 14 people in Gaza on Sunday in strikes across Khan Younis, Gaza City, and Deir el-Balah.

item.title: Philippines earthquake kills 15, prompts tsunami fears: All to know
item.description: The latest tremors come eight months after the Philippines suffered its strongest earthquake in 12 years.

item.title: China’s Xi Jinping arrives in North Korea on rare state visit
item.description: A cheering crowd dressed in festive attire welcomes the Chinese leader at Pyongyang's main square.

item.title: Israel’s strikes on Iran expose Trump’s failure to restrain Netanyahu
item.description: Israel’s strikes on Iran expose Trump’s failure to restrain Netanyahu.

item.title: Asia’s stock markets dive amid Iran-Israel conflict, Wall Street jitters
item.description: South Korea’s main index plunges nearly 9 percent, while stocks in Japan, Taiwan and Hong Kong also see sharp falls.

item.title: Ukraine, Russia trade fire as Zelenskyy allies back call for direct talks
item.description: UK, France, and Germany support Zelenskyy's proposal for a meeting with Putin, as drone attacks continue.

item.title: New York stabbing, Kansas City shooting raise World Cup security concerns
item.description: Six people were stabbed in New York and nine injured in Kansas City, days before the World Cup's opening weekend.

item.title: Yemen’s Houthis declare ban on Israeli ships sailing the Red Sea
item.description: Yemen’s Houthis have declared a ‘total ban’ on Israeli vessels wanting to pass through the Red Sea.

item.title: Magnitude 7.8 earthquake rocks southern Philippines
item.description: At least 15 people were killed and 129 injured in a magnitude 7.8 earthquake that struck the southern Philippines.

item.title: Ori Goldberg: Israel’s escalations threaten relationship with US
item.description: Ori Goldberg: Israel’s escalations threaten relationship with US

item.title: Perez re-elected at Real Madrid paving way for Mourinho’s return as manager
item.description: Jose Mourinho expected to be announced as Real Madrid manager, returning to Real Madrid after 13 years.

item.title: Israel and Iran exchange attacks as ceasefire falters
item.description: In effort to contain escalation, US President Donald Trump spoke with Israel's Benjamin Netanyahu, US media reported.

item.title: ‘Homes turned into ovens’: Millions of Yemenis swelter amid heat, blackouts
item.description: Millions of Yemenis grapple with a heatwave as power cuts add to the suffering of people in the war-torn nation.

item.title: Secret Service-level security for NBA Finals with Trump attending Game 3
item.description: Watch party bans, road closures and bag bans in place as US President Trump plans to attend Game 3 with Knicks in lead.

item.title: What time are World Cup 2026 matches in my time zone?
item.description: Find out the match time in your part of the world for the 104 fixtures of the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: How Lebanon and Iran’s war of words became backdrop for latest Israel clash
item.description: Iran had warned that talks could be stopped and attacks would resume if Israel continued to hit Lebanon.

item.title: Iran war day 101: Tensions escalate as Iran and Israel trade air attacks
item.description: Tensions have escalated between Iran and Israel while ongoing diplomatic efforts have failed to yield lasting peace.

item.title: Missiles intercepted over occupied East Jerusalem and West Bank
item.description: The Israeli army said it intercepted missiles launched from Iran on Monday in response to attacks from Israel.

item.title: Portugal World Cup 2026 preview: Players to watch, group matches and squad
item.description: Portugal are hugely talented but are led by a fading Cristiano Ronaldo and are still grieving the loss of Diogo Jota.
